caption: A man with a tall, silver, textured wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a studio setting, speaking into a professional microphone. He is dressed in a white button-down shirt with a small red bow tie and tan suspenders. The background consists of a wall adorned with framed photographs and shelves containing clothing and accessories, including a garment with the text "LEE" visible. On the left side of the frame, a logo for "99 STUDIO PODCAST" appears, while the right side features a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a similar position, subtly shifting his head and facial expression as he speaks, while the camera angle and overall setting remain static.
